projectSummary: This project tracks the final tasks of Sprint 12, focusing on user authentication, database migration, frontend components, and testing environment setup. The team is currently working towards a production deployment scheduled for Friday, but faces critical blockers including missing API documentation and a down staging server.
objectives: Resolve critical bugs in the testing environment
Deploy the verified build to production by Friday
keyDeliverables: User authentication and password reset functionality
Stable staging environment and verified deployment

tasks.name: Implement password reset
tasks.sourceEvidence: Sarah: Completed user authentication, working on password reset
tasks.missingInfo: Specific deadline or estimate for password reset completion
tasks.suggestedAction: Confirm with Sarah if password reset will be ready for Friday's deployment.

tasks.name: Complete database migration
tasks.sourceEvidence: Mike: Database migration running, will finish today
tasks.suggestedAction: Verify migration completion at the end of the day.

tasks.name: Complete frontend components
tasks.sourceEvidence: Lisa: Frontend components 80% done, blocked on API specs
tasks.suggestedAction: Identify and assign a backend developer to provide the API specifications to Lisa immediately.

tasks.name: Resolve 3 critical bugs in testing environment
tasks.sourceEvidence: Alex: Testing environment setup, found 3 critical bugs
tasks.missingInfo: Assignee for fixing the 3 critical bugs
tasks.suggestedAction: Triage the bugs with Alex and assign them to Sarah or Mike for immediate resolution.

tasks.name: Deploy to production
tasks.missingInfo: Deployment owner and release plan details
tasks.suggestedAction: Designate a release manager and draft a deployment checklist.

risks.name: Missing API Documentation
risks.description: Lisa is blocked on completing frontend components (currently at 80%) due to missing API specifications.
risks.solution: Prioritize API documentation delivery and assign a backend developer to share the specs with Lisa immediately.

risks.name: Staging Server Down
risks.description: The staging server is currently down, which prevents proper integration testing before Friday's production deployment.
risks.solution: Assign DevOps or infrastructure support to investigate and restore the staging server immediately.

risks.name: Unresolved Critical Bugs
risks.description: Alex found 3 critical bugs in the testing environment that could delay the Friday deployment if not resolved.
risks.solution: Triage the bugs immediately and assign them to Sarah or Mike for rapid resolution.

recommendations.title: Unblock Frontend Development
recommendations.description: Immediately assign a backend resource to document and deliver the API specifications to Lisa.

recommendations.title: Restore Staging Server
recommendations.description: Prioritize restoring the staging server to ensure deployment verification can occur before Friday.

recommendations.title: Triage Critical Bugs
recommendations.description: Conduct an immediate triage session for the 3 critical bugs found by Alex to assign fixes.

missingInfoAlerts.description: API specifications are missing, blocking Lisa from completing frontend components.
missingInfoAlerts.suggestedAction: Identify who owns the API design and request immediate documentation.

missingInfoAlerts.description: Staging server is down, risking the Friday production deployment.
missingInfoAlerts.suggestedAction: Engage DevOps to bring the staging environment back online.
